author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase B.1 of real-artifact-driven development — add BERT-family (sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2, 22M params, 6 layers, 384 hidden, Apache 2.0) as the first encoder-only architecture. Steps: (1) Add new ferrotorch-bert crate to workspace (clean separation from ferrotorch-llama since BERT is encoder-only, post-norm, learned positional embeddings, GELU, vs Llama's causal/decoder-only, pre-norm, RoPE, SiLU/SwiGLU — different enough to warrant a separate crate). (2) Implement BertEmbeddings (word+position+token_type+LayerNorm), BertSelfAttention (12 heads, non-causal), BertSelfOutput (Linear + add+norm post-norm), BertIntermediate (Linear+GELU), BertOutput, BertLayer x6, BertModel + SentenceTransformer wrapper (mean-pool over attention mask + L2 normalize). (3) Add scripts/pin_pretrained_text_weights.py to pin to ferrotorch/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (strip the sentence-transformers '0.auto_model.' prefix in safetensors keys to land on the standard BERT layout). (4) Add scripts/verify_text_embedding_inference.py with cosine_sim_min=0.999, max_abs<=0.01. (5) Add cargo test wrapper. (6) Register in ferrotorch-hub registry.
